name: xbox-openxbl-mcp
title: Xbox Live (OpenXBL)
description: Xbox Live profiles, achievements, and presence via OpenXBL (xbl.io) API proxy — simple API key auth, no OAuth
author: community

setup.blurb: Xbox Live data via the OpenXBL proxy — no OAuth, just an API key. Covers profiles, achievements, and presence. For full Xbox Live access (SmartGlass, messaging, clips), use xboxlive-blade-mcp instead.
setup.help_text: Register at xbl.io, verify your Xbox account, and copy your API key from the dashboard. Free tier includes limited requests; paid plans scale.

notes: Community alternative to xboxlive-blade-mcp. Trades feature coverage for setup simplicity — API key auth via xbl.io proxy instead of OAuth2. Limited to read-only operations exposed by the OpenXBL API. No SmartGlass, messaging, clips, or Store catalog. Free tier has rate limits; paid plans ($3/mo) for higher throughput.
